mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cs_conversation (user_id, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM cs_conversation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE cs_conversation SET updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE cs_conversation SET status = 0, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM cs_conversation WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
